name: npm Registry
description: The npm Registry is the world's largest software registry for JavaScript packages. Search, download, and publish Node.js packages with version management and dependency resolution.

capabilities.name: search_packages
capabilities.description: Search for npm packages by keyword, author, or description.

capabilities.name: get_package
capabilities.description: Get full metadata for a specific npm package including all versions.

capabilities.name: get_package_version
capabilities.description: Get metadata for a specific version of an npm package.

capabilities.name: get_downloads
capabilities.description: Get download statistics for a package over a time period.

capabilities.name: publish_package
capabilities.description: Publish a new version of a package to the npm registry.

capabilities.name: manage_dist_tags
capabilities.description: Add, remove, or list distribution tags for a package.
